subcodes.first_line: O kindred of that servant of the Blessed Beauty, that captive of the love of the Ancient Beauty, that prince of the realm of glory and sovereign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خویشان آن خادم جمالمبارک آن اسیر محبت جمال قدم امیر کشور عزت و شهریار
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @soul; spirit after death, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
